semantic.role: Defines code formatting rules for the ArchSpine project's source files, ensuring consistent style across contributions.
invariants: Print width must not exceed 100 characters per line
Semicolons are required at end of statements
Trailing commas are mandatory in all multi-line constructs

English.role: Defines code formatting rules for the ArchSpine project's source files, ensuring consistent style across contributions.

parameter_definitions.printWidth: Sets the maximum line length to 100 characters. Lines exceeding this will be wrapped by the formatter, improving readability and preventing horizontal scrolling.
parameter_definitions.singleQuote: Enforces the use of single quotes (') instead of double quotes (") for all string literals. This reduces visual noise and aligns with common JavaScript conventions.
parameter_definitions.semi: Requires semicolons at the end of every statement. This prevents potential issues from automatic semicolon insertion (ASI) and clarifies statement boundaries.
parameter_definitions.trailingComma: Mandates trailing commas wherever valid (e.g., in arrays, objects, function parameters). This reduces diff noise in version control when adding new items.

English.stability_and_risks: This configuration enforces a strict, predictable code style. The primary risk is developer friction if the rules conflict with existing code or personal preferences, but this is mitigated by automated formatting. The invariants (printWidth, semi, trailingComma) are safe and widely adopted; they improve code consistency and reduce merge conflicts. No operational or security risks are introduced.

Simplified Chinese.role: 定义 ArchSpine 项目源代码的代码格式化规则，确保所有贡献的代码风格一致。

parameter_definitions.printWidth: 设置最大行长度为 100 个字符。超过此长度的行将被格式化器自动换行，从而提高可读性并避免横向滚动。
parameter_definitions.singleQuote: 强制所有字符串字面量使用单引号（'）而非双引号（"）。这可以减少视觉干扰，并符合常见的 JavaScript 编码惯例。
parameter_definitions.semi: 要求在每条语句末尾添加分号。这可以防止自动分号插入（ASI）可能引发的问题，并明确语句的边界。
parameter_definitions.trailingComma: 在所有允许的位置（如数组、对象、函数参数）强制使用尾随逗号。这可以减少版本控制中新增条目时产生的差异噪声。

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 此配置强制执行严格且可预测的代码风格。主要风险在于如果规则与现有代码或个人偏好冲突，可能会引起开发者的抵触情绪，但通过自动化格式化可以缓解此问题。这些不变规则（printWidth、semi、trailingComma）安全且被广泛采用；它们能提高代码一致性并减少合并冲突。此配置不会引入任何操作或安全风险。
